reviews.author: Joanne Koong
reviews.summary: Requested additional comment to clarify the submit lock's purpose and stability of registered regions.

reviews.author: Jens Axboe
reviews.summary: Approved the patch with thanks, no further comments.
reviews.raw_body:
On 3/25/26 1:56 PM, Joanne Koong wrote:
> Good idea, I will add a comment about this to make this more clear,
> something like:
> /*
>  * The submit lock ensures we don't see partially initialized state
>  * if another thread is currently registering the region. Once registered,
>  * the region is stable for the ring's lifetime (no unregister API exists),
>  * so it's safe to access the returned pointer outside the lock.
>  */

Perfect, thanks!

-- 
Jens Axboe

2026-03-25.patch_summary: Joanne Koong suggested adding a comment to clarify the submit lock's purpose and stability of registered regions.
